meaning: n.海军学校学生,英国海军少尉之侯补军官
examples: He had become a midshipman at age sixteen.
He was rated as a midshipman.
"No, Sir," the midshipman replied. "I have no idea what the problem is."
They fell in love when she was a high school senior and he was a midshipman at the U.S. Merchant Marine Academy.
Midshipman Bilotta is committing to an extra two years on the Navy payroll in order to get extended training in her chosen specialty: underwater explosives disposal.
